title: Public relations professionals
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate advertising policies and programs or produce collateral materials, such as posters, contests, coupons, or giveaways, to create extra interest in the purchase of a product or service for a department, an entire organization, or on an account basis. Plan, direct, or coordinate activities designed to create or maintain a favorable public image or raise issue awareness for their organization or client. Plan, direct, or coordinate activities to solicit and maintain funds for special projects or nonprofit organizations. (Based on 4 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Coordinate with marketing team members, graphic artists, and other communications professionals to develop and implement marketing programs and campaigns.
Identify and develop contacts for promotional campaigns and industry programs that meet identified buyer targets, such as dealers, distributors, or consumers.
Manage communications and sales team, including setting goals, providing incentives, and evaluating employee performance.
Represent the organization at trade association meetings and promotional events to enhance product and service visibility.
Direct and coordinate product research and development as well as advertising strategies for organizations.
Contact organizations and corporate representatives to explain services offered and raise awareness for organizational goals.
Coordinate with the media to disseminate advertising content and monitor responses to evaluate advertising effectiveness.
Train and supervise workers engaged in developing, producing, and presenting advertisements or campaigns.
Establish and maintain cooperative relationships with representatives of community, consumer, and public interest groups to further campaign goals.
Prepare and deliver presentations, speeches, and press releases to promote organizational objectives and public relations efforts.
Plan, prepare, and execute promotional material to increase public awareness of products or services, working collaboratively with various departments.
Consult with advertising agencies to arrange promotional campaigns in different media types for various stakeholders.
Coordinate activities to secure funding for special projects or nonprofit initiatives, including negotiating contracts and managing budgets.
Conduct research to identify trends, consumer behavior, and the effectiveness of marketing tactics for strategic decision-making.
Compile materials to submit to granting organizations and develop strategies to encourage new or increased contributions from donors.
Plan and direct special events for fundraising and public relations, to increase organizational visibility and support.
Develop public relations strategies and communication plans to promote organizational activities that benefit public interest.
Evaluate promotion programs and collaborate with stakeholders to ensure compatibility with public relations and fundraising efforts.

Attend training sessions or professional meetings to develop or maintain professional knowledge.
Develop procedures to evaluate organizational activities.
Prepare financial documents, reports, or budgets.
Maintain operational records for green energy processes or other environmentally-sustainable activities.
Coordinate operational activities with external stakeholders.
Represent the organization in external relations.
Negotiate sales or lease agreements for products or services.
Manage operations, research, or logistics projects.
Advise customers on technical or procedural issues.
Maintain contingency plans for disaster recovery.
Communicate with management or other staff to resolve problems.
Provide educational information to the public.
Develop collaborative relationships between departments or with external organizations.
Coordinate logistics for productions or events.
Develop operating strategies, plans, or procedures.
Operate still or video cameras or related equipment.
Liaise between departments or other groups to improve function or communication.
Monitor external affairs or events affecting business operations.
Develop contingency plans to deal with organizational emergencies.
Inform the public about policies, services or procedures.
Coordinate with external parties to exchange information.

emerging_tasks.task: Manage stewardship activities to maintain connection with donors.

reported_job_titles: Institutional Advancement VP (Institutional Advancement Vice President)
